comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *mheon* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [mheon] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

@QiWang19 a PR like this is the first step in the Podman release process. We look at all the PRs tagged with the appropriate label (`Release Notes 1.6.0` for this release) that were merged, and then compile them all in `RELEASE_NOTES.md`. Anything not yet merged will be untagged 1.6.0.

I think I'm going to keep `flag` vs `option` and CGroup vs cgroup for now; they're used in older releases too.

We might want to go in with sed and hit all of them at once, though.
@rhatdan @baude Anyone want to whack this with a /lgtm /hold?
Just found two more nits.  Feel free to ignore them, but if by chance you need to make other changes, please nab them.
@baude @rhatdan I think CI on master is broken - the F29 remote client system tests seem to be failing everywhere
